pi_items.source: Verified via setup_task.sh which either copies or downloads the Tooth Growth dataset to this exact target path.
Verified via task.json prompt and verifier.py which checks for the existence of this file.
Verified via task.json prompt and verifier.py which looks for this text file containing model AUCs.
Verified via task.json prompt requiring 'SET RANDOM SEED to 42' and verifier.py checking the zip for randomSeed=42.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires training K-Nearest Neighbors and Decision Tree classification models on the real ToothGrowth dataset located at `/home/ga/Documents/JASP/ToothGrowth.csv`. The task explicitly requires setting the random seed to 42 for both models to ensure reproducible results. The resulting JASP project must be saved to `/home/ga/Documents/JASP/Classifier_Comparison.jasp` and a text report evaluating AUC must be saved to `/home/ga/Documents/JASP/model_performance.txt`.
